title: Breach record (PIPEDA-style) - minimum content
description: Register of ALL breaches incl. non-notifiable, modelled on Canada's Breach of Security Safeguards Regulations (SOR/2018-64) and GDPR Art. 33(5). Valorises the Art. 33(5) documentation duty with concrete minimum fields + retention.
source: Breach of Security Safeguards Regulations SOR/2018-64; OPC guidance; GDPR Art. 33(5)
retention_note: Minimum 24 months after the day the organisation determines the breach occurred (SOR/2018-64).

minimum_fields.label: Circumstances and cause of the breach (if known)
Date or period of the breach (or approximation)
Description of the personal information involved (to the extent known)
Steps taken to reduce/mitigate the risk of harm
Steps taken or planned to notify affected individuals (where applicable)
